message:
feat(fleet-launcher,session-profiles): add program mix targets, agent entity registration, durable-state checkpoints, and command routing

Fleet Launcher subsystem integration (ft-3681t.3.x):
- execute_with_subsystems() accepts optional DurableStateManager and
  CommandRouter, enabling pre-launch checkpoints for rollback on partial
  failure and bootstrap command dispatch through the command transport layer
- Each fleet slot now registers a corresponding Agent lifecycle entity
  alongside its Pane entity, providing first-class agent identity tracking
  in the lifecycle registry
- launch_with_subsystems() convenience method for plan+execute in one call
- dispatch_bootstrap_commands() routes slot bootstrap commands through
  CommandRouter with proper scope and context metadata
- LaunchOutcome extended with pre_launch_checkpoint and bootstrap_dispatches
- Updated entity count assertions (1 session + 1 window + N panes + N agents)

Session Profiles weighted program mix targets:
- FleetTemplate gains program_mix_targets: Vec<FleetProgramTarget> for
  declaring target weight ratios between agent programs (e.g., 3:1
  claude-code to codex-cli)
- FleetLaunchPlan computes program_mix_deltas: Vec<FleetProgramMixDelta>
  showing the actual-vs-target weight delta for each program, queryable
  by downstream schedulers for rebalancing decisions
- Validation rules for program mix targets: reject empty program names,
  zero weights, and duplicate entries
- ProfileValidationError extended with EmptyProgramMixTarget,
  InvalidProgramMixWeight, DuplicateProgramMixTarget variants

Test updates:
- native_mux_reliability_harness: updated FleetSlot/FleetTemplate
  structs with new required fields (weight, startup_phase,
  program_mix_targets, startup_strategy)
- mission_agent_mail_integration: new fleet_launch_emitters_roundtrip
  test validating fleet launch start/progress/outcome notices with
  fleet context metadata and canonical thread IDs

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
